node.html:
• Delivered analytics solutions for healthcare and business operations clients -- Power BI dashboards, SSIS ETL pipelines, SQL Server data warehousing supporting clinical and executive stakeholders.
  • Automated end-to-end reporting workflows reducing manual effort by 40%.
  • Implemented Row-Level Security governance for data compliance.
  • Optimized T-SQL queries via execution plan analysis, improving report performance by ~30%.

• Designed a centralized SQL Server data warehouse using star-schema modeling to support enterprise analytics and self-service reporting.
  • Built T-SQL stored procedures and SSIS packages with structured logging and validation checks.
  • Developed Power BI semantic models with DAX measures enabling scalable reporting across business units.

frontmatter.title: Biomedical Research Intern
frontmatter.company: Brigham and Women's Hospital, Harvard Medical School

node.html:
• Contributed to point-of-care diagnostic device development -- 3D printing, microfluidic fabrication, saliva sample testing, and clinical workflow validation for smartphone-based diagnostics.
  • Worked within a multidisciplinary team of engineers, clinicians, and researchers under Dr. Hadi Shafiee, Division of Engineering in Medicine.
  • Co-author: Mitsunami M. et al., Fertility and Sterility (2025) -- peer-reviewed validation of smartphone-based semen analysis.
